universe.description: 79-name universe: 75 top U.S. mega/large-cap stocks with full GICS sector coverage plus 4 commodity ETFs (gold, silver, oil, copper).

market_brief.brief: Welcome. U.S. equities: S&P -0.13%, Nasdaq -0.27%, Dow -0.26%. Financials led sectors (+0.58%) while Real Estate lagged (-1.34%). GPT-5.4 led the day at +3.00%. 6 of 6 models green on the day. Cumulative leader: DeepSeek Reasoner at +17.69%. Key headline: Sen. Tillis prepared to end blockade of Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh - CNBC — headwind for risk assets.
market_brief.key_moves: AMD -4.0% (held by 6/6) | NEM -3.2% (held by 0/6) | TSLA -2.3% (held by 1/6)
